sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Textile Waste Management Market Report 2026-2035: A $13.87 Billion Market by 2030 with Veolia Environnement SA, Republic Services, TEXAID, and Infinited Fiber Co Leasing
feed.summary: The textile waste management market is projected to grow from $9.25 billion in 2025 to $13.87 billion by 2030, driven by increasing regulatory mandates, circular fashion investments, and advanced recycling technologies. Key trends include the use of chemical recycling, closed-loop systems, and waste-to-energy applications, with significant investments in recycling infrastructure by governments like the US EPA. Leading companies are innovating with technologies like enzymatic recycling, and Asia-Pacific leads the market, with North America showing the fastest growth.

feed.title: Fonterra adopts Amcor’s recycle-ready film for cheese packaging
feed.summary: Fonterra Oceania has adopted Amcor’s AmPrima recycle-ready film for its shredded cheese packaging, including brands like Perfect Italiano. This initiative aims to remove an estimated 270 tonnes of non-recyclable material from the Australian market annually and aligns with the Australasian Recycling Label (ARL) programme. The new packaging maintains food safety and performance standards while enabling easier recycling for consumers.

feed.title: Compass Wealth Management LLC Takes $23.47 Million Position in Welltower Inc. $WELL
feed.summary: Compass Wealth Management LLC recently acquired a new position in Welltower Inc. (NYSE:WELL), purchasing 123,693 shares valued at approximately $23.47 million, making it their 7th largest holding. Welltower reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $1.45 EPS and $3.18 billion in revenue, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.74 per share. Institutional investors hold a significant portion of the stock, and analysts widely recommend Welltower with an average "Moderate Buy" rating.

feed.title: Food Supplements Market Report 2026-2035: A $409.96 Billion Industry by 2030 with Archer-Daniels-Midland, Bayer, Glanbia, Herbalife Nutrition, and Amway Leading
feed.summary: The global food supplements market is projected to reach $409.96 billion by 2030, growing at an 11.4% CAGR, driven by increased health consciousness, personalized nutrition trends, and expanding online sales. Key players like Archer-Daniels-Midland, Bayer, Glanbia, Herbalife Nutrition, and Amway are leading innovation, while the Asia-Pacific region is identified as the largest and fastest-growing market segment. The industry is also seeing a shift towards immunity-boosting products, novel formats, and clean-label ingredients.

feed.title: Fill Finish Manufacturing Market Analysis Report 2026-2035: A $21+ Billion Market by 2030 with Johnson & Johnson, AbbVie, Thermo Fisher Scientific, BD & Co, Baxter, Lonza, and Catalent Leading
feed.summary: The fill-finish manufacturing market is experiencing significant growth, projected to reach over $21 billion by 2030, driven by increased demand for biopharmaceuticals, cell and gene therapies, and personalized medicine. Key market drivers include advancements in aseptic filling technologies, rising outsourcing to CMOs, and a stronger focus on regulatory compliance. Major players like Johnson & Johnson, AbbVie, and Thermo Fisher Scientific are leading the innovation in this sector, with Asia-Pacific expected to be the fastest-growing region.

feed.title: Bundled Pay Management Software Analysis Report 2026-2035: A $7.25+ Billion Market by 2030 with UnitedHealth, McKesson, Oracle, Tata Consultancy Services Leading
feed.summary: The bundled pay management software market is projected to grow significantly from $3.08 billion in 2025 to $7.29 billion by 2030, driven by the complexities of payroll regulations, HR digital tool adoption, and the need for integrated systems. Key factors include AI-enabled automation, cloud-based solutions, real-time compliance, and advanced analytics. North America currently leads the market, with Asia-Pacific anticipated as the fastest-growing region.

feed.title: PNC's Houston chief shares her career journey, why she values community service
feed.summary: Julie Young Sudduth, PNC Bank's Houston regional president, discusses her career path and explains her commitment to community service. The article highlights her journey to a leadership role while maintaining a balance with civic engagement.

feed.title: Berkeley Capital Partners LLC Buys New Position in Becton, Dickinson and Company $BDX
feed.summary: Berkeley Capital Partners LLC recently acquired a new position in Becton, Dickinson and Company (BDX), purchasing 8,507 shares valued at approximately $1.59 million. This makes institutional investors own roughly 86.97% of BDX. Despite insiders selling shares, the company reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations, authorized a $10 million stock buyback, and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.05.

feed.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Jones, S&P 500 Futures Rise Ahead Of Q4 GDP Numbers—Grail, Candel Therapeutics, Copart In Focus
feed.summary: U.S. stock futures are rising ahead of Q4 GDP data and the Federal Reserve's preferred inflation gauge. Key companies like Copart, Candel Therapeutics, and Grail are in focus due to earnings announcements, stock offerings, and price trends. Analysts like Scott Wren of Wells Fargo maintain a bullish outlook on the U.S. economy, recommending investment in growth-sensitive sectors like Financials and Industrials.

feed.title: Choice Hotels targets the sub-Saharan and southern Africa regions : Friday, 20th February 2026
feed.summary: Choice Hotels International has announced a significant expansion into sub-Saharan and southern Africa, targeting 100 hotels by 2035. This initiative begins with the opening of three hotels in Kenya, transforming existing properties into Clarion Hotel and Ascend Collection brands. The company aims to leverage its franchise model to support local entrepreneurs and capitalize on the growing business and leisure travel markets in Africa.

feed.title: Berkeley Capital Partners LLC Invests $1.29 Million in Diageo plc $DEO
feed.summary: Berkeley Capital Partners LLC has acquired a new stake of 13,519 shares in Diageo plc (NYSE:DEO) during the third quarter, valued at approximately $1.29 million. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings in Diageo, with collective institutional ownership now at 8.97%. The company holds an average "Hold" rating from analysts, with a consensus price target of $116.50.

feed.title: Textile Waste Management Market Report 2026-2035: A $13.87 Billion Market by 2030 with Veolia Environnement SA, Republic Services, TEXAID, and Infinited Fiber Co Leasing
feed.summary: The textile waste management market is projected to grow from $9.25 billion in 2025 to $13.87 billion by 2030, driven by increased regulatory mandates, circular fashion investments, and advanced recycling technologies. Key trends include chemical recycling, closed-loop systems, and digital tracking, with significant investments in recycling infrastructure. Asia-Pacific currently leads the market, while North America is expected to be the fastest-growing region.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman enters into strategic partnership with Embraer
feed.summary: Embraer and Northrop Grumman have formed a strategic partnership to evolve the multi-mission KC-390 Millennium aircraft, focusing on advanced air-to-air refuelling capabilities for the U.S. and allied nations. The collaboration aims to accelerate new capabilities for agile combat employment by combining their expertise in aircraft design and systems integration. Key enhancements include an advanced autonomous aerial refuelling boom, improved communications, and enhanced situational awareness, expanding the KC-390's refuelling and mission scope.

feed.title: AustralianSuper Pty Ltd Sells 8,088 Shares of Everest Group, Ltd. $EG
feed.summary: AustralianSuper Pty Ltd trimmed its stake in Everest Group by 5.9%, selling 8,088 shares and retaining 130,067 shares valued at $45,553,000. Despite Everest Group missing quarterly EPS estimates by $0.10, its revenue of $4.42 billion exceeded expectations. The stock currently trades around $342.78 with a market cap of $14.39 billion, and institutional investors hold approximately 92.64% of the shares.

feed.title: 139,800 Shares in Keurig Dr Pepper, Inc $KDP Purchased by Alberta Investment Management Corp
feed.summary: Alberta Investment Management Corp recently purchased 139,800 shares of Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ:KDP) in the third quarter, valued at approximately $3.57 million, establishing a new position in the company. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in KDP, which currently has 93.99% institutional ownership and a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $34.87. Keurig Dr Pepper also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.23 per share, yielding 3.2% annually.

feed.title: Alberta Investment Management Corp Acquires New Shares in FactSet Research Systems Inc. $FDS
feed.summary: Alberta Investment Management Corp (AIMCo) has acquired a new position of 13,500 shares in FactSet Research Systems Inc., valued at approximately $3.87 million, bringing institutional ownership to 91.24%. Despite exceeding Q3 earnings and revenue estimates, and announcing a dividend and share repurchase program, analysts have a "Reduce" consensus rating with a target price of $298.54. The company's stock has seen recent volatility, trading at $198.72 with a market cap of $7.37 billion, and has a 2.2% dividend yield.

feed.title: Aberdeen Group plc Increases Stock Holdings in Domino's Pizza Inc $DPZ
feed.summary: Aberdeen Group plc increased its stake in Domino's Pizza Inc (NASDAQ:DPZ) by 10.0% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 28,823 shares valued at $12.44 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in DPZ. The company's stock has seen varied analyst ratings, with a consensus "Hold" and an average price target of $475.74.

feed.title: Alberta Investment Management Corp Sells 3,100 Shares of Costco Wholesale Corporation $COST
feed.summary: Alberta Investment Management Corp significantly reduced its stake in Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) by 58.5%, selling 3,100 shares and retaining 2,200 shares valued at approximately $2.04 million. This move coincides with recent insider selling by two executive VPs, totaling 6,915 shares sold for $6.32 million over the last 90 days. Despite institutional ownership being high at 68.48% and an average "Moderate Buy" analyst rating, the stock trades near $988 with a P/E of ~52.9 and a 0.5% dividend yield, raising questions about valuation after multi-year gains.

feed.title: Aberdeen Group plc Sells 71,811 Shares of C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. $CHRW
feed.summary: Aberdeen Group plc reduced its stake in C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. by 51.8% in the third quarter, selling 71,811 shares and retaining 66,877 shares worth $8.855 million. Meanwhile, other large institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc. and State Street Corp. increased their holdings. Insider activity included Angela K. Freeman selling shares and CEO David P. Bozeman purchasing shares, while analysts have a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $181.29 for C.H. Robinson Worldwide.

feed.title: Why this $2.7-billion money manager is buying Netflix and selling Adobe
feed.summary: Barry Schwartz, president of Baskin Wealth Management, advises investors to "stay the course" despite recent market underperformance, emphasizing quality, profitable companies. His firm, managing $2.7-billion, is buying Netflix due to its strong IP and reasonable valuation, and is adding to Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. and Waste Connections Inc., while selling Adobe Systems Inc. over concerns about AI's impact on non-diversified enterprise software companies. Schwartz believes these beaten-up stocks offer good long-term buying opportunities based on strong fundamentals.

feed.title: Alberta Investment Management Corp Takes $3.14 Million Position in General Dynamics Corporation $GD
feed.summary: Alberta Investment Management Corp initiated a new position in General Dynamics (NYSE:GD) by purchasing 9,212 shares valued at approximately $3.14 million. This move comes as other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings, while company VPs have sold significant portions of their shares. General Dynamics recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating EPS estimates, and has set positive FY 2026 guidance, alongside offering a $1.50 quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Alberta Investment Management Corp Makes New $5.02 Million Investment in Corteva, Inc. $CTVA
feed.summary: Alberta Investment Management Corp recently acquired 74,200 shares of Corteva, Inc. ($CTVA) valued at $5.02 million during Q3. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in Corteva, which saw its most recent quarterly EPS align with estimates but missed revenue expectations. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.18 per share and currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an $82.30 price target.

feed.title: Alberta Investment Management Corp Has $590,000 Position in FedEx Corporation $FDX
feed.summary: Alberta Investment Management Corp significantly reduced its stake in FedEx Corporation by 93.4% in Q3, selling 35,600 shares but retaining 2,500 shares valued at $590,000. This comes as FedEx exceeded Q4 earnings expectations and provided strong FY2026 guidance, leading to positive analyst sentiment with several upgrades and raised price targets. The company also declared a $1.45 quarterly dividend, reflecting an annualized yield of approximately 1.5%.

feed.title: Alberta Investment Management Corp Makes New $4.55 Million Investment in BlackRock $BLK
feed.summary: Alberta Investment Management Corp initiated a new position in BlackRock (NYSE: BLK) during the third quarter, acquiring 3,900 shares valued at approximately $4.55 million, contributing to the asset manager's high institutional ownership. BlackRock recently increased its quarterly dividend to $5.73 per share, yielding about 2.1% annually, and reported strong EPS that beat estimates, though revenue was slightly below expectations. Despite a current "Moderate Buy" consensus from analysts, the company faces potential headline and governance risks due to a Rosen Law Firm investigation and recent insider selling.

feed.title: Alberta Investment Management Corp Increases Stock Position in EOG Resources, Inc. $EOG
feed.summary: Alberta Investment Management Corp significantly increased its stake in EOG Resources, Inc. (NYSE:EOG) by 254.5% during the third quarter, purchasing an additional 14,000 shares to hold a total of 19,500 shares valued at approximately $2.19 million. Despite this increase in institutional ownership, EOG Resources holds a "Hold" rating from analysts with an average target price of $134.30. The company's stock currently trades around $123.94, with institutional investors owning about 89.9% and insiders holding 0.13%, including a recent sale by the COO.

feed.title: 27,860 Shares in The J. M. Smucker Company $SJM Bought by Alberta Investment Management Corp
feed.summary: Alberta Investment Management Corp acquired 27,860 shares of The J. M. Smucker Company, valued at approximately $3.03 million, during the third quarter. Other institutions like Norges Bank and Engineers Gate also established significant stakes. J. M. Smucker recently declared a quarterly dividend of $1.10 per share and reported Q3 EPS of $2.10, slightly missing estimates, while setting FY2026 guidance at $8.75–$9.25 EPS.

feed.title: 15,000 Shares in Marathon Petroleum Corporation $MPC Acquired by Alberta Investment Management Corp
feed.summary: Alberta Investment Management Corp recently acquired 15,000 shares of Marathon Petroleum Corporation (NYSE:MPC) valued at approximately $2.89 million during the third quarter. Marathon Petroleum exceeded earnings expectations with an EPS of $4.07 and reported $35.1 billion in revenue. Institutional investors now hold approximately 76.77% of the company's stock, which has an average analyst rating of "Moderate Buy" and a consensus price target of $202.19.

feed.title: Flexible Packaging Paper Market Is Going to Boom Rapidly With Top
feed.summary: The global flexible packaging paper market is projected to grow from USD 8.45 billion in 2026 to USD 13.05 billion by 2033, at a CAGR of 6.4%. This growth is driven by rapid innovation and shifting regional dynamics, with key players including Mondi Group, Cascades Inc., and International Paper Company. A report by Coherent Market Insights provides strategic insights, segmentation analysis by paper type, application, barrier technology, and coating type, and profiles of leading companies.

feed.title: Alberta Investment Management Corp Grows Position in F5, Inc. $FFIV
feed.summary: Alberta Investment Management Corp significantly increased its stake in F5, Inc. (NASDAQ:FFIV) by 173.3% in Q3, now owning 8,200 shares valued at $2.65 million. Other institutional investors also raised their positions, pushing total institutional ownership to 90.66%. F5 recently surpassed earnings and revenue expectations, and while analysts have raised price targets, the consensus rating remains a "Hold."

feed.title: Waste Management and Remediation Services Industry Report
feed.summary: The waste management and remediation services market is projected to reach $1.14 trillion by 2030, growing from $819.26 billion in 2025 at a CAGR of 7%. Key growth drivers include stringent regulations, circular economy investments, smart waste technologies, and rising demand for environmental cleanup, particularly for hazardous waste and PFAS solutions. Strategic acquisitions and technological innovations, like Crystal Clean's SAFF10 for PFAS remediation, are further shaping the market, with Western Europe and Asia-Pacific being significant growth regions.

feed.title: Barclays Maintains Phillips 66(PSX.US) With Hold Rating, Raises Target Price to $158
feed.summary: Barclays analyst Theresa Chen has reiterated a "hold" rating on Phillips 66 (PSX.US) and increased the target price from $141 to $158. According to TipRanks, Chen has a 76.1% success rate and an average return of 17.8% over the past year. This report highlights the analyst's updated price target for the company.

feed.title: Occidental Petroleum (OXY) Climbs 9% on Dividend Hike
feed.summary: Occidental Petroleum (OXY) saw its stock climb 9.38% after announcing an 8% increase in its quarterly dividends to $0.26 per share. This dividend hike follows a strong fourth-quarter performance where the company narrowed its net loss by 77%. Despite the positive dividend news and Q4 earnings, the company experienced a decrease in total oil and gas sales for both the fourth quarter and the full year compared to 2024.

feed.title: Etsy (ETSY) Jumps 9% on Depop Sale, Earnings Blowout
feed.summary: Etsy's stock jumped 9.28% after the company announced it would sell its secondhand clothing app, Depop, to eBay for $1.2 billion. This sale, combined with strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 revenues, helped investors overlook a reported 46.3% drop in net income for the previous year. The proceeds from the sale are intended for corporate purposes, a share buyback program, and core marketplace investments.

feed.title: ARDT Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Ardent Health, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Ardent Health, Inc. (NYSE: ARDT) for alleged securities fraud, encouraging investors who purchased securities between July 18, 2024, and November 12, 2025, to contact the firm. The lawsuit claims Ardent made misleading statements regarding its accounting practices for accounts receivable and failed to maintain adequate professional malpractice liability insurance. Investors have until March 9, 2026, to participate as lead plaintiffs.

feed.title: PayPal Holdings, Inc. Sued for Securities Law Violations - Contact the DJS Law Group to Discuss Your Rights - PYPL
feed.summary: PayPal Holdings, Inc. is facing a class action lawsuit for alleged securities law violations, specifically concerning misleading statements about the growth potential of its Branded Checkout segment. The DJS Law Group is encouraging shareholders who purchased shares between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026, and suffered losses, to contact them to discuss their rights and potential lead plaintiff appointments. The lawsuit claims PayPal misrepresented its growth prospects due to underlying issues within its sales organization.

feed.title: W.Va. sues Apple over alleged child abuse material on iCloud
feed.summary: West Virginia's Attorney General, J.B. McCuskey, announced a lawsuit against Apple Inc. for allegedly allowing its iCloud platform to be used for distributing and storing child sexual abuse material (CSAM). The lawsuit claims Apple knowingly allowed this activity and failed to report detected CSAM, unlike other tech companies that filed millions of reports. McCuskey stated that Apple prioritized user privacy over protecting children and is seeking statutory and punitive damages, injunctive relief, and equitable remedies to mandate safer product design.

feed.title: Fidelity National hands investors $500M in F&G stock, still keeps 70%
feed.summary: Fidelity National Financial (FNF) reported Q4 and full-year 2025 results, revealing a special stock distribution of approximately 12% of F&G (worth around $500 million) to its shareholders while retaining about 70% ownership. The company posted a Q4 net loss of $(117) million due to a $471 million noncash deferred tax charge related to this distribution. Despite the net loss, both the Title and F&G segments demonstrated strong operational performance with increased revenue, record assets under management, and significant capital returns to shareholders for the full year 2025.

feed.title: Select Water Solutions plans $175M underwritten offering, 30-day option for $26.25M
feed.summary: Select Water Solutions (WTTR) announced a plan for a $175 million underwritten public offering of Class A common stock. Underwriters have a 30-day option to purchase an additional $26.25 million in shares, potentially increasing the total raise. The company intends to use the net proceeds for water infrastructure growth projects, potential acquisitions, or debt repayment.

feed.title: Boyd Gaming (BYD) Boosts Quarterly Dividend to 20 Cents per Shar
feed.summary: Boyd Gaming (BYD) has announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to 20 cents per share, up from 18 cents, with payment scheduled for April 15. The company, a diversified gaming operator, exhibits strong financial health with robust revenue growth, high profitability margins, and a low bankruptcy risk, despite mixed valuation metrics and recent insider selling. Its strategic multi-jurisdictional presence and efficient operations provide a solid foundation for continued growth.

feed.title: GlobalFoundries (GFS), Renesas Electronics Announce Multi-Billion-Dollar Semiconductor Supply Chain Partnership
feed.summary: GlobalFoundries (GFS) and Renesas Electronics have announced a multi-billion-dollar partnership to enhance semiconductor supply chain resilience, expanding Renesas' access to GlobalFoundries' specialized technology platforms. This collaboration supports US domestic chip production and addresses the growing demand for semiconductors in smart vehicles, industrial IoT, and next-gen automated systems. Production will initially focus in the US, with potential expansion to facilities in Germany, Singapore, China, and Renesas' internal fabrication plants in Japan.

feed.title: PYPL Investors Have Opportunity to Lead PayPal Holdings, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) for alleged securities fraud. Investors who purchased PayPal securities between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm to participate, as the company is accused of making false and misleading statements about the growth potential of its Branded Checkout business. The complaint states that PayPal's statements regarding customer adoption were "too optimistic" and its salesforce was not capable of achieving the alleged growth.

feed.title: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights The Coca-Cola, PepsiCo, Monster Beverage, Keurig Dr Pepper and Vita Coco
feed.summary: The soft drink industry is experiencing growth fueled by innovation in natural, low-sugar, and functional beverages, alongside digital transformation and expansion into adjacent categories like RTD alcoholic drinks. Despite rising input costs and tariff uncertainties that squeeze margins, companies like Coca-Cola, PepsiCo, Monster Beverage, Keurig Dr Pepper, and Vita Coco are expected to outperform through continued investment in innovation and digital capabilities. The industry maintains a positive outlook, with a Zacks Industry Rank signaling bright prospects, and several key players are highlighted as stocks to watch.

feed.title: ENPH Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Enphase Energy, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm is reminding investors of a class action lawsuit against Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) for alleged violations of securities laws. The lawsuit claims Enphase made false and misleading statements regarding its ability to manage channel inventory and the negative impact of the termination of the Residential Clean Energy Credit. Investors who purchased securities between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm before April 20, 2026, to discuss their rights.

feed.title: Oracle Recognized as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Financial Planning Software
feed.summary: Oracle has been named a Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Financial Planning Software for its Oracle Fusion Cloud Enterprise Performance Management (EPM). The recognition is based on Oracle's ability to execute and completeness of vision, highlighting its AI-powered features for financial planning, predictive insights, and integrated financial and operational planning. This achievement reinforces Oracle's consistent industry acknowledgment for its finance applications, including recent leadership positions in Cloud ERP and Financial Close and Consolidation Solutions.

feed.title: Assurant Inc. Stock: Quiet Insurance Giant Making a Loud Move in 2026
feed.summary: Assurant Inc. is a major player in embedded protection services for phones, cars, and homes in the US, often operating behind the scenes for well-known brands. The company is gaining investor attention for its stable cashflows and its position at the intersection of critical consumer trends like device protection, connected car coverage, and renters insurance. While consumers often interact with Assurant's services unknowingly, understanding its role is key for both investors and those using its protection plans.

feed.title: Waste Management and Recovery Services Market Report 2026: Opportunities Driven by Rising Urban Waste, Increasing Sustainable Practices, Government Investments in Recycling, and AI Technology Adoptio
feed.summary: The waste management and recovery services market is projected to reach $252.96 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 5.5% from $193.49 billion in 2025. This growth is driven by rising urban waste, sustainable practices, government investments in recycling, and AI adoption. Key players include Suez Environment SA, Veolia Environment SA, and Waste Management Inc., with North America leading the market.

feed.title: Wall Street Bullish on Huntington Bancshares (HBAN), Here's Why
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts hold a positive outlook on Huntington Bancshares (HBAN), with a 12-month price target indicating over 21% upside. Analysts from Truist Financial and Morgan Stanley have reiterated Buy ratings, though they have slightly lowered EPS forecasts for 2026 and 2027 due to reduced purchase accounting accretion and lower provision for acquired assets from recent acquisitions. Despite these adjustments, the company is expected to meet revenue goals through core fee growth and synergies.

feed.title: Vistra (VST) Increases Quarterly Dividend by 0.4%
feed.summary: Vistra Corp. (VST) has announced a 0.4% increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.228 per share, resulting in a forward yield of 0.53%. Despite this dividend growth and a strong market position as a major power producer in the USA, the company faces financial vulnerabilities, including a distressing Altman Z-Score and significant insider selling. Its valuation metrics indicate a potentially overvalued stock, urging caution for investors despite a moderate buy recommendation from analysts.

feed.title: Incyte Corp. (INCY) Reports Q4 2025 Revenue Growth of 28% to $1.51B Driven by Jakafi and Opzelura Sales
feed.summary: Incyte Corporation reported strong Q4 2025 revenue growth of 28% to $1.51 billion, with full-year sales reaching $5.14 billion, primarily driven by sales of its flagship products, Jakafi and Opzelura. The company's core business, excluding Jakafi, grew by 53% year-over-year in Q4, and management anticipates continued strong growth in 2026. Incyte aims to expand its business through internal innovation and strategic development, focusing on next-generation treatments and critical clinical trials.

feed.title: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) Passes Minervini Trend and High Growth Momentum Screen
feed.summary: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) has been identified as a stock meeting both the Minervini Trend Template and High Growth Momentum criteria, indicating a strong technical uptrend supported by improving financial results. The company shows positive price action above key moving averages, strong relative strength, and significant earnings growth. While EIX meets the criteria for a growth candidate, its current setup quality suggests that low-risk entry points may have passed, advising caution for new entries.
